title: pecteilis marginata
intro: Pecteilis marginata, also known as the Chinese spring orchid or spring orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to China. It is a traditional medicinal herb in Chinese medicine, known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to boost the immune system and fight off infections. The medicinal properties of Pecteilis marginata have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as skin conditions and wounds. In traditional herbal medicine, Pecteilis marginata is often prepared as a decoction or a powder, and can also be used topically to accelerate wound healing.
